scripts.build: npm run build --workspace nizel && npm run build --workspace nizel-plugin-abbr --workspace nizel-plugin-alert --workspace nizel-plugin-autolink --workspace nizel-plugin-citations --workspace nizel-plugin-code-copy --workspace nizel-plugin-deflist --workspace nizel-plugin-details --workspace nizel-plugin-diagrams --workspace nizel-plugin-emoji --workspace nizel-plugin-footnotes --workspace nizel-plugin-frontmatter-ui --workspace nizel-plugin-gfm --workspace nizel-plugin-heading-anchors --workspace nizel-plugin-math --workspace nizel-plugin-media --workspace nizel-plugin-sanitize --workspace nizel-plugin-shiki --workspace nizel-plugin-toc --workspace nizel-plugin-typography && npm run build --workspace nizel-kit && npm run build --workspace nizel-benchmarks && npm run build --workspace @nizel/documentation
scripts.benchmark: npm run build --workspace nizel --workspace nizel-plugin-alert --workspace nizel-plugin-deflist --workspace nizel-plugin-typography --workspace nizel-plugin-math --workspace nizel-plugin-footnotes --workspace nizel-plugin-diagrams && npm run benchmark --workspace nizel-benchmarks --
scripts.benchmark:plugins: npm run build && npm run benchmark:plugins --workspace nizel-benchmarks --
scripts.benchmark:nizel: npm run build --workspace nizel && npm run benchmark:nizel --workspace nizel-benchmarks --
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:run
scripts.test:commonmark:smoke: npm run build --workspace nizel && COMMONMARK_SMOKE=1 node packages/nizel/conformance/commonmark-spec-runner.mjs
scripts.test:commonmark:report: npm run build --workspace nizel && COMMONMARK_REPORT=1 node packages/nizel/conformance/commonmark-spec-runner.mjs
scripts.test:commonmark:smoke:report: npm run build --workspace nizel && COMMONMARK_SMOKE=1 COMMONMARK_REPORT=1 node packages/nizel/conformance/commonmark-spec-runner.mjs
